metadata.name: GCCS Synthetic CUI Demo Dataset
metadata.purpose: Provide realistic, clearly labeled CUI-like workflow examples for demo, training, QA, and onboarding without using real customer or government-sensitive content.
limitations: Synthetic examples are not legal, contracting, CMMC assessment, export-control, or labor compliance advice.
Synthetic examples must not be used as customer records, official determinations, certification evidence, or production compliance content.
The dataset intentionally excludes real customer CUI, classified data, export-controlled technical data, payroll data, secrets, and customer proprietary information.
metadata.sourceBasis: GCCS-authored fictional examples derived from public compliance workflow patterns and non-sensitive product requirements.

records.title: Aegis Systems Workshop LLC

classification.reason: Approved fictional demo company for synthetic CUI workflow training.

records.sampleText: Fictional small business profile with placeholder UEI DEMOUEI12345 and non-routable contact details.

records.title: Synthetic CUI Handling Training Support Order

classification.reason: Approved fictional contract scenario for demo-only CUI handling workflow.

records.sampleText: Fictional contract DEMO-26-CUI-0001 uses placeholder clauses and invented dates for training only.

records.title: Synthetic Access Control Evidence

classification.reason: Approved fictional evidence metadata for demo-only CMMC readiness workflow.

records.sampleText: Fictional evidence record describes a sample MFA configuration and contains no screenshots, credentials, network details, or customer system data.

records.title: Synthetic CMMC Boundary Gap

classification.reason: Approved fictional CMMC readiness scenario for synthetic CUI demo tenant workflows.

records.sampleText: Fictional readiness gap asks a demo user to document a sample system boundary for training purposes.

records.title: Northstar Demo Components

classification.reason: Approved fictional subcontractor example for synthetic flow-down tracking.

records.sampleText: Fictional subcontractor record demonstrates a placeholder flow-down acknowledgement and no real supplier information.

records.title: Synthetic Prime Evidence Package

classification.reason: Approved fictional report example for demo-only evidence package workflows.

records.sampleText: Fictional report summary aggregates synthetic obligations, evidence, and subcontractor statuses for training only.
